channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Bag containing nitrous oxide cylinders dumped behind bike cage, 9th March
item.description:
Bag containing nitrous oxide cylinders dumped behind bike cage
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Southborough Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Parking at Langley Shops, 9th March
item.description:
Cars parked up the kerb and on the pedestrian area at the shops slip road. Totally unnecessary and potentially blocking the way for pedestrians/wheelchair users. Perhaps this area can be marked with parking bays to help motorists know where and how to park or better still can the whole area be pedestrianised?

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Wickham Road, Beckenham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Shattered glass on grass verge and in kerb, 9th March
item.description:
Shattered glass on grass verge and in kerb

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 177, Wickham Way, Park Langley, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Graffit, 9th March
item.description:
Outside no 33. Remove graffiti from bus shelter

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Northover, Downham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Graffiti / Flyposting on stop or shelter (non-offensive)

item.title: Wooden pallett, 9th March
item.description:
Someone has left a wood pallet on the foot path outside of number 113 Okehampton Crescent that we have stood up out of the way

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Okehampton Crescent, East Wickham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Abandoned vehicle with front wheels removed, 9th March
item.description:
A vehicle has been abandoned with its front wheels taken off and is now propped up on tyres. In a precarious position balanced on the tyres. Been there for a while. Very dangerous.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Warwick Terrace, Plumstead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Possible broken asbestos board behind bus shelter, 9th March
item.description:
Likely asbestos board broken on ground behind bus shelter broadwater road,carronade place bus stop toward woolwich.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Garrick Drive, Thamesmead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Vehicle abandoned with front missing, 9th March
item.description:
Vehicle abandoned with the whole front bumper / bodywork missing. Hasn’t moved for some time.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Warwick Terrace, Plumstead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Graffiti, 9th March
item.description:
Northover junction of Shroffold zRoad Remove graffiti from bus shelter

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Northover, Downham, Greater London

item.category: Graffiti / Flyposting on stop or shelter (non-offensive)

item.title: Broken bin, 9th March
item.description:
This bins wheels are broken and it doesnt stand up right.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Pytchley Road, East Dulwich, Greater London

item.title: Racist graffiti on bus shelter outside new Bermondsey logistics hub on Dunton Road, 9th March
item.description:
Racist graffiti, pls remove

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Dunton Road, Old Kent Road, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Massive dog poo in middle of walkway, 9th March
item.description:
Dog poo in middle of walk way

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Well Street, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Communal bins have not been emptied, 9th March
item.description:
Communal bins in Massey Close full and overflowing. The same with the ones on High Road which are particularly bad
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Massey Close, Southgate
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Two Loose manhole covers which are unsafe in bus lane outside Sainsburys on Camberwell Road SE5, 9th March
item.description:
Two Manhole covers are loose and rock when buses' wheels go over them making a loud noise. These covers are within bus lane outside Sainsburys on Camberwell Road SE5 travelling towards Elephant and Castle. The covers are unsafe and pose a safety risk and make a loud noise when contact is made by wheels. The issue has been present for many months.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 170, Camberwell Road, Camberwell, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: All 4 bins full and overflowing. Two rubbish, two recycling, 9th March
item.description:
All four communal bins have not been emptied today and are all extremely full and overflowing.
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): High Road, Southgate
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Potholes, 9th March
item.description:
The junction has multiple potholes
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Chislehurst Road, Petts Wood, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Road work's signs, 9th March
item.description:
At the top of Ramsden Rd as you try to pull out onto colyers lane ,looking to your right you cannot see what is coming because the rd works signs are blocking the view. It is very dangerous and I just had to pull out and hope for the best!
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Colyers Lane, Northumberland Heath, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: X2 black bags dumped (daytime), 9th March
item.description:
As above
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 4, High Road, Harringay, Wood Green, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Multiple episodes of dog fouling, 9th March
item.description:
All along Curzon avenue there are multiple episodes of dog fouling, from the train station end of the road to nags head road. New stools every day.
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Curzon Avenue, Enfield
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Graffiti, 9th March
item.description:
Castillion Road outside no 65. Remove graffiti from bus timetable holder

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Castillon Road, Catford South, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Graffiti / Flyposting on stop or shelter (non-offensive)
